prose:
**Aniline frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, exact four-center integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed structure (14 atoms), single-point calculation (not DFT-relaxed). SCF converged in 9 cycles.

**HOMO = −5.554 eV** (orbital index 24)
**LUMO = −0.249 eV** (orbital index 25)
**HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.305 eV** (Koopmans-picture, single-particle orbital gap; vertical ionization/attachment threshold approximation)

The gap value reflects the energy difference between the frontier orbitals. The HOMO is π-like (aromatic C–C/N system); the LUMO is π\* (aromatic virtual). Extended frontier region ±3 orbitals also reported.

No warnings. Integrity check passed (energy finite, SCF converged, schema valid).

Method command: `frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`
